UW-29  POSTWELD HEAT TREATMENT EXEMPTIONS. (a) PWHT is not mandatory for the following conditions, except as required by UCS-79: (1) carbon steel vessels with a nominal thickness not exceeding the limits specified in this paragraph; (2) vessels constructed of P-No. 1 materials with preheat applied per UW-28. (b) When PWHT is omitted under the provisions of this paragraph, the impact test requirements of UCS-56 and UCS-66 shall still apply. (c) The exemption shall be documented as required by UG-120. See also UW-40 for PWHT procedures when treatment is performed. For service restrictions, refer to UW-2.
